flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY Polytechnic Institute fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (57.6% → 43.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY Polytechnic Institute rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.3k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY Polytechnic Institute fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
